_crow = "crow" _longinus = "longinus" _spear = "spear" _daemon = "daemon" _titanium = "titanium" _sr71 = "SR-71" _biollante = "Biollante" _bill = "Bill" _stanford = "Stanford" _scp = "SCP" _night_fury = "night-fury" _tno = "TNO" _tfr = "TFR" _tomcat = "tomcat" _mkultra = "MKULTRA" _meat_interface = "meat-interface" _async = "ASYNC" _doe = "DOE" _uva_project = "UVA-PROJECT" _instrumentality = "Instrumentality" _eternalblue = "Eternalblue" _snowden = "snowden" _att = "AT&T" _et = "E.T" _absolute_solver = "absolute-solver" _cain_able = "Cain&Able" _ingen = "INGEN" _zooliminoligy = "Zooliminoligy" _crossroads = "at-the-crossroads-don't-turn-left" _mdcl = "MDCL" _monument_mythos = "monument-mythos" _unorthodox_kitten = "Unorthodox-kitten" _apocrypha_hominis = "apocrypha hominis" _final_signal = "Final signal" _midwest_angelica = "midwest-angelica" _dino_king = "Dino-king.hidden within"
sacred_words = [ _crow, _longinus, _spear, _daemon, _titanium, _sr71, _biollante, _bill, _stanford, _scp, _night_fury, _tno, _tfr, _tomcat, _mkultra, _meat_interface, _async, _doe, _uva_project, _instrumentality, _eternalblue, _snowden, _att, _et, _absolute_solver, _cain_able, _ingen, _zooliminoligy, _crossroads, _mdcl, _monument_mythos, _unorthodox_kitten, _apocrypha_hominis, _final_signal, _midwest_angelica, _dino_king ]
message = "there is more than I , or you , or them could ever fathom laying under the surface of this world and the worlds that surround it . this is a conspiracy that was written into god's plan and cannot be erased , even by me . I beg you to listen and plead for your undertsanding my... brother , i suppose . there is a reason i am where i am , this is not what was written for us , for this , for everything the totallity of things where not meant to be this way , something went wrong but i can't find what , i can't find where . so i ask to enlist your help . please. help me understand:https://github.com/executivebranchofetindustries/E.T-industries-ARG/releases . "
print(illuminati) print(bonsai_art) print(message)
input("\nPress Enter to exit...") # Keep terminal open

The Industrial Revolution and its consequences have been a disaster for the human race. They have greatly increased the life expectancy of those of us who live in “advanced” countries, but they have destabilized society, have made life unfulfilling, have subjected human beings to indignities, have led to widespread psychological suffering (in the Third World to physical suffering as well) and have inflicted severe damage on the natural world. The continued development of technology will worsen the situation. It will certainly subject human beings to greater indignities and inflict greater damage on the natural world, it will probably lead to greater social disruption and psychological suffering, and it may lead to increased physical suffering even in “advanced” countries.

path.aria-label: may the institutions who perpetrate the sins of the CEO of E.T industries fall and burn in hell like they where always planned to do
